parameters.jsCode:
return [
  {code: 'AR', name: 'Argentine', query: 'Argentina'},
  {code: 'AU', name: 'Australie', query: 'Australia'},
  {code: 'BR', name: 'Brésil', query: 'Brazil'},
  {code: 'CA', name: 'Canada', query: 'Canada'},
  {code: 'CN', name: 'Chine', query: 'China'},
  {code: 'FR', name: 'France', query: 'France'},
  {code: 'DE', name: 'Allemagne', query: 'Germany'},
  {code: 'IN', name: 'Inde', query: 'India'},
  {code: 'ID', name: 'Indonésie', query: 'Indonesia'},
  {code: 'IT', name: 'Italie', query: 'Italy'},
  {code: 'JP', name: 'Japon', query: 'Japan'},
  {code: 'MX', name: 'Mexique', query: 'Mexico'},
  {code: 'RU', name: 'Russie', query: 'Russia'},
  {code: 'SA', name: 'Arabie Saoudite', query: 'Saudi Arabia'},
  {code: 'ZA', name: 'Afrique du Sud', query: 'South Africa'},
  {code: 'KR', name: 'Corée du Sud', query: 'South Korea'},
  {code: 'TR', name: 'Turquie', query: 'Turkey'},
  {code: 'GB', name: 'Royaume-Uni', query: 'United Kingdom'},
  {code: 'US', name: 'États-Unis', query: 'United States'},
  {code: 'EU', name: 'Union Européenne', query: 'European Union'}
].map(c => ({json: c}));
